title: coreopsis pringlei
intro: Coreopsis pringlei, also known as Pringle's tickseed, is a perennial flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties due to its content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Coreopsis pringlei include reducing inflammation and improving immune function, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. Coreopsis pringlei can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to promote overall well-being and support the body's natural healing processes.
